title: Cute n' Sweet!
description: A mod full of new food and cute blocks!
body:
**Unforunately, this mod is no longer being updated. Please read [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/mortuary/wall/post/1106863/) if you would like more information.**

Welcome to the **Cute n' Sweet!** mod! This mod is made for those who would like to make their Minecraft experience more adorable <3

This mod adds tons of new foods and blocks to the game, as well as cute new biomes and dimensions!

Explore your world to find lots of ingredients to craft the new food items.

Some items are exclusive to the new dimensions! Explore the **chocolate dimension**, **gingerbread dimension**, and the **wicked wilds** to find them :)

There are tons of new wallpapers and food themed blocks for you to build with. You can find the cute wallpapers by crafting a **wallpaper mystery box** that drops a bunch of them for you! Craft the food themed blocks by experimenting with the new foods you've cooked up :D

If you need more information, please check out the mod guide [here](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1SZVd1Z7azgdFlj-RQKW6aa5N0gBZR19n5FH6UL6tvU0/edit?usp=sharing)!
